hero.title: SERA NORR presents refined stone furniture.
hero.subtitle: Travertine, Calacatta Viola and other stone types shaped into sculptural, clear designs. Custom made from material, form and size.

intro.text: SERA NORR is an online atelier for stone furniture. We work with natural materials and calm forms. Each piece is designed around proportion, detail and the character of the stone itself.

collections.title: Collections
collections.description: Our collections are material-driven and form the basis for custom work.
collections.other: Selection of other stone types — on request

materials.title: Natural stone types.
materials.description: We select on colour, pattern and structure. Variation belongs to the material and remains visible in the design.

configurator.title: Compose your piece.
configurator.description: Use the configurator to determine material, form and dimensions. We translate this into a concrete proposal.

home.statement: Calm forms. Strong materials. Clear choices.

shop.title: Available pieces
shop.description: A selection of pieces from our collections, ready for delivery or customisable to measure.

closing.title: Receive a proposal.
closing.description: Share your preferences and dimensions. You will receive a proposal based on your chosen material and design.

intro.line1: SERA NORR presents refined collections in travertine, Calacatta Viola and other stone types.
intro.line2: Natural materials shaped into sculptural, clear designs. A foundation for custom work in form, size and detail.

terra.name: TERRA
terra.subtitle: Travertine
terra.description: Travertine with calm tones and natural layering. Designs with gentle strength, clear lines and a calm presence.
terra.longDescription: The TERRA collection draws from the ancient warmth of Italian travertine—stone formed over millennia from mineral springs, carrying within it the memory of water. Each piece reveals the characteristic pitting and honeyed tones that make travertine one of nature's most expressive materials.

vanta.name: VANTA
vanta.subtitle: Calacatta Viola
vanta.description: Calacatta Viola with rich veins and pronounced contrast. Clean forms that let the material speak without excess.
vanta.longDescription: VANTA celebrates Calacatta Viola—among the rarest and most dramatic marbles quarried from the Apuan Alps. Its bold violet veining against luminous white creates pieces that are as much sculpture as furniture.

other.name: OTHER STONES
other.subtitle: Selection on request
other.description: For projects with a specific stone type or colour tone, we work with a selected material choice outside the fixed collections.

optional.line1: Each collection is a starting point.
optional.line2: You choose the material and a base form; we adjust size and details to your wishes.

endCta.title: Compose your piece.
endCta.description: Use the configurator to determine material, form and dimensions.

collections.customDescription: Every piece can be customized. Discuss your vision with our atelier.

bespoke.subtitle: Bespoke Atelier
bespoke.title: Your Vision, Realized
bespoke.description: Every space has its own language. Our bespoke service translates your vision into sculptural permanence—pieces designed for one space alone, crafted with materials chosen for you, and built to last generations.
bespoke.step1Description: We begin with a conversation about your space, your needs, and your aesthetic vision. Share inspiration, dimensions, and dreams.
bespoke.step2Description: Our atelier develops initial sketches and material proposals. We source rare stones and present options tailored to your project.
bespoke.step3Description: Refined drawings, 3D visualizations, and material samples. Every proportion is considered, every detail refined.
bespoke.step4Description: Your piece is crafted by our European artisans. We document the process, keeping you connected to your object's creation.
bespoke.step5Description: White-glove delivery and professional installation. Your piece finds its home.
bespoke.materialsDescription: Our atelier works with an ever-evolving library of exceptional materials. From rare marbles quarried in limited quantities to bespoke concrete formulations, we source materials that elevate your piece beyond the ordinary.
bespoke.naturalStoneList: Travertine, Calacatta Viola, Verde Alpi, Nero Marquina
bespoke.metalAccentsList: Brushed brass, blackened steel, bronze patina
bespoke.craftsmanshipDescription: Every Sera Norr piece is crafted by master artisans in our European workshop. We combine traditional stone-working techniques with contemporary precision, ensuring each piece meets our exacting standards.
bespoke.leadTimeDescription: Lead times for bespoke commissions typically range from 12 to 20 weeks, depending on material sourcing and complexity. We believe in craftsmanship that cannot be rushed.
bespoke.formVisionPlaceholder: Describe your wishes: type of furniture, dimensions, material preferences...
bespoke.formSuccessDescription: Thank you for your interest. Our atelier will be in touch within 48 hours.

about.subtitle: The Atelier
about.title: Form Follows Material
about.description: Sera Norr was founded on a singular belief: that exceptional furniture begins with profound respect for material. We don't impose form upon stone—we discover it.
about.philosophyDescription1: In an age of disposability, we create for permanence. Each Sera Norr piece is designed to be passed between generations, its beauty deepening with time and use.
about.philosophyDescription2: Our approach is unhurried. We spend weeks selecting materials, months in development, and refuse to rush craftsmanship. The result is furniture that transcends trend.
about.value1Description: We source the world's rarest stones, spending months finding the perfect slab.
about.value2Description: Every piece exists at the intersection of furniture and art object.
about.value3Description: Traditional techniques refined over generations, executed with precision.
about.value4Description: Objects designed to outlast trends, meant for generational inheritance.
about.value5Description: The courage to leave out, to simplify, to trust the material.
about.value6Description: Deep partnership with clients to realize singular visions.
about.studioDescription: Our studio in Amsterdam serves as both workshop and showroom. Visits are by appointment only, allowing us to offer undivided attention to each client.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Begin the Conversation
contact.description: Whether you're ready to discuss a bespoke piece or simply wish to learn more about our work, we welcome your message.
contact.formSuccessDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We'll respond within 48 hours.

footer.tagline: Online atelier for bespoke stone furniture.

common.showroomDescription: Experience our collections in person. By appointment only.
common.bespokeDescription: Every space deserves an object made for it alone. Our bespoke service transforms your vision into sculptural permanence—from initial sketch to final installation.
